import timeit
import json


def benchmark_parse():
    payload = '{"key": "value", "items": [1, 2, 3]}'
    timeit.timeit(lambda: json.loads(payload), number=10000)


def benchmark_sort():
    data = list(range(1000))
    timeit.timeit(lambda: sorted(data), number=5000)


def benchmark_string_ops():
    timeit.timeit(lambda: "hello world".upper(), number=100000)


def run_all_benchmarks():
    benchmark_parse()
    benchmark_sort()
    benchmark_string_ops()
    print("All benchmarks completed")
